pages.text: $(l)Spell Catalysts$() are Botania items that modify your spells when carried in your inventory or Curios slots.$(br2)$(l)Rune Catalysts (5):$(br)$(li)Rune of Fire: +25% fire damage, lingering burn$(br)$(li)Rune of Water: AoE healing splash$(br)$(li)Rune of Earth: +30% shield, knockback resist$(br)$(li)Rune of Air: +30% cast/projectile speed$(br)$(li)Rune of Mana: -25% mana cost

$(l)Lens Catalysts (2):$(br)$(li)Velocity Lens: +50% projectile speed, +30% range$(br)$(li)Bore Lens: Pierce up to 3 targets$(br2)$(l)Material Catalysts (2):$(br)$(li)Terrasteel: 20% crit chance, -15% cooldown$(br)$(li)Gaia Spirit: +50% damage, -30% cooldown$(br2)Catalysts can stack (configurable). They may be consumed on use depending on server settings.
